mapper.select: SELECT * FROM index_valuation WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} ORDER BY data_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO index_valuation ( index_code, name, history_low_text, valuation_label, level, pe_date, pe, pe_percentile, data_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{name}, #{historyLowText}, #{valuationLabel}, #{level}, #{peDate}, #{pe}, #{pePercentile}, #{dataTime}, #{createTime} )
